features.description: Core payment orchestration — captures against invoices via provider intents + saved payment tokens + basic dispute handling.
Advanced provider set. Small tenants get Stripe + Paddle + PayPal + CustomWebhook only. Medium+ unlock Adyen + Square.
Manual capture flow — authorize now, capture later. Enables pre-authorized bookings (hold funds at booking, capture at check-in).
Save tokenized payment methods for repeat customers. Provider-scoped tokens; never card PAN.
Accept payments in currencies other than the tenant's default currency. Requires provider support for the target currency.
Force 3D Secure 2 authentication on ALL card transactions regardless of amount or PSD2 threshold. Reduces fraud risk for high-risk industries.
Dispute lifecycle workflow: evidence collection, submission, accept-vs-fight decisions.

Generic HMAC-signed webhook driver for tenant-run payment gateways (Braintree direct, dLocal, PayFast, etc.). Enterprise-only — the risk profile of caller-hosted gateways requires manual security review.
Nightly reconciliation reports + on-demand reconcile trigger. Signal drift between our records + provider records.
Extends payments + payment_disputes retention from 7 years to 10 years. For finance regimes requiring longer ad-spend + revenue audit trails.
